title: Real Estate Brokerage
tagline: Expert-led sales and leasing across Bahrain's most sought-after developments
description: ASK Real Estate's brokerage division is the foundation of our integrated service offering, connecting buyers, sellers, landlords, and tenants across Bahrain's residential and commercial markets. Our RERA-licensed consultants bring deep local knowledge combined with international standards to every transaction, ensuring clients receive transparent, performance-driven guidance. ASK has facilitated transactions across over $3 billion in assets under management, giving our team unmatched market intelligence and negotiating leverage. Whether you are acquiring your first property or expanding an investment portfolio, ASK delivers outcomes that set benchmarks in the industry.
features: Residential sales across apartments, villas, and penthouses
Commercial leasing and investment property acquisition
Off-plan and new development advisory
Investment portfolio structuring and asset strategy
RERA-licensed agents with full market appraisal support

title: Property Management
tagline: End-to-end management so your investment works harder without the hassle
description: ASK Real Estate offers comprehensive property management services designed to protect and maximise the returns of landlords and investors across Bahrain. From tenant sourcing and rigorous vetting through to rent collection, lease renewals, and coordinated maintenance, our team handles every aspect of your asset on your behalf. Our managed portfolio gives us the operational scale to negotiate superior service contracts and respond to issues faster than individual landlords ever could. ASK provides full transparency through regular reporting, giving owners complete visibility over their investment performance at all times.
features: Tenant sourcing, screening, and placement
Lease drafting, renewals, and legal compliance
Rent collection and arrears management
Planned and reactive maintenance coordination
Detailed monthly and annual landlord reporting

title: Property Valuation and Advisory
tagline: RICS and IVSC accredited valuations trusted by banks, investors, and institutions
description: ASK Real Estate delivers independent, accredited property valuations conducted in accordance with Royal Institution of Chartered Surveyors (RICS) and International Valuation Standards Council (IVSC) guidelines. Our valuation reports are accepted by all major financial institutions in Bahrain for mortgage and financing purposes, and are regularly instructed by government bodies, insurance firms, and private equity funds requiring certified opinions of value. ASK's advisory team provides investment analysis, feasibility appraisals, and strategic counsel to help clients make informed decisions in a complex market. Our team has also completed consultancy and valuation assignments in the UK, Africa, and the UAE, bringing a genuinely international perspective to every engagement.
features: Mortgage and bank financing valuations
Investment and institutional portfolio assessments
Insurance reinstatement cost appraisals
Dispute resolution and arbitration support
Development feasibility and highest-and-best-use analysis

title: Facility Management
tagline: Seamless building operations for residential towers and commercial assets
description: ASK Real Estate's Facility Management division provides owners and developers with a single point of accountability for the full operational lifecycle of their buildings. Our FM teams manage MEP systems, cleaning contracts, security services, and common area upkeep for residential towers, commercial properties, and mixed-use developments across Bahrain. ASK brings a proactive, preventive approach to building maintenance that reduces capital expenditure over time and protects asset value for investors and unit owners alike. All FM operations are underpinned by structured service level agreements and regular performance reporting to ownership.
features: MEP preventive and corrective maintenance programs
Professional cleaning and grounds management
Security personnel and access control systems
Common area and amenity operations
CAPEX planning and third-party contractor oversight

title: Interior Design and Architecture
tagline: Design-led fit-outs that elevate value and accelerate returns
description: ASK Real Estate's Interior Design and Architecture studio partners with property owners, developers, and tenants to transform spaces into environments that command premium rents and sell faster in the market. Our team delivers the complete design journey — from initial concept development and space planning through to 3D visualisation, material specification, contractor procurement, and final handover snagging. Whether the brief calls for a luxury residential interior, a corporate office fit-out, or a retail transformation, ASK brings creativity and commercial rigour to every project. Our in-house capability ensures design vision and budget discipline are never in conflict.
features: Concept development and space planning
3D visualisation and photorealistic renders
Material, furniture, and FF&E specification
Contractor procurement and construction oversight
Snagging, defect resolution, and client handover

title: Owners Association Management
tagline: Professional HOA governance and RERA-compliant strata management
description: Managing an Owners Association in Bahrain demands expert knowledge of RERA regulations, service charge accounting, reserve fund governance, and multi-stakeholder relations — expertise that ASK Real Estate has built through years of hands-on OA management across the Kingdom. Our team handles everything from initial RERA registration and annual AGM facilitation through to service charge collection, maintenance fund planning, and dispute mediation between unit owners. ASK ensures that every OA we manage operates in full compliance with Bahraini law while maintaining the building standards that protect individual unit values. Transparent financial reporting is provided to all owners as a matter of course.
features: RERA Owners Association registration and ongoing compliance
Annual service charge budget preparation and levy
AGM facilitation, minutes, and resolution management
Maintenance reserve fund planning and governance
Unit owner communications and dispute resolution

title: Hospitality Services
tagline: Premium serviced apartment management for Bahrain's corporate and leisure market
description: ASK Real Estate's Hospitality Services division capitalises on Bahrain's growing demand for high-quality furnished accommodation from corporate travellers, relocating executives, and the leisure market. We manage fully serviced apartments through a combination of major online platforms and a direct corporate booking channel, handling every operational detail from professional staging and linen services to guest communications and dynamic revenue management. Property owners benefit from higher yields compared to traditional long-term leasing, with none of the operational burden. ASK provides full monthly remittance statements and performance analytics so owners always know exactly how their asset is performing.
features: Professional apartment staging and furnishing consultation
Multi-platform listing management and rate optimisation
24/7 guest communications and check-in coordination
Housekeeping, linen, and maintenance services
Monthly owner remittance with detailed performance reporting
